title: G2PLUS Burgundy Satin Ribbons, 10mm Gift Wrap Ribbon, 22M Ribbons for Gift Wrapping, Christmas Day Decorative Ribbon, Thick Fabric Ribbon, Gift Wrapping Ribbon for Crafting, Wedding Party Deco
features: 【 Material】The gift ribbon roll is made of polyester fabric, strong and smooth, Lasts and doesn’t crease easily.
【Size】You'll get 1 rolls of 10mm wide ribbons and 22m in length. please allow slight errors on size. due to manual measurement.

【Looks Good on Wrapping up Presents】You can incorporate the simplicity brown paper with really beautiful ribbon. it will give a simple yet elegant look. it will add some nice sparkle when you use this gift ribbon for wrapping presents.

【Nice Ribbon for Handmade Project】These Satin ribbons are good to use in homemade card making or scrapbooking or for hanging up home ornaments. Ideal for wrapping up gifts or using for wedding decorations, wrapping around the bouquet or cake.

【Versatile Christmas Ribbons】This set of ribbons is perfect for for many type of craft and decoration such as making different decorations for your Christmas tree and a bow for a wreath! also good for present wrapping, gift packaging, party favor, hair bow, floral projects and so on.
description: Product Description Stain Fabric Ribbon for Gift Wrapping These stain ribbons are available in a wide range of sizes and colours, you can use different colours and sizes of ribbons to decorate different styles of gifts or parties. You can also use these ribbons to decorate cakes, wrap bouquets or make hair accessories. Burgundy Satin Ribbon for Wrapping Gift Gift Wrapping Ribbon Our gift wrapping ribbons has an elegant and festive look, which can help you wrap your gifts beautifully and add an elegant ambience to your gifts. Red Ribbon for Hair These satin ribbons feel great and are super soft, making them ideal for adding beautiful accents to hair accessories. Bouquet Tying Ribbon The gift ribbon roll is made of polyester fabric, strong and smooth, Lasts and doesn’t crease easily. Perfect for tying bouquets. Stain Ribbon for Decoration These stain ribbons can be used as crafts packaging ribbons, party decorative ribbons, costume decorative ribbons in addition to gift wrapping.
